Engineering built for industrial progress.

In-house engineering, manufacturing and testing for infrastructure, mobility, energy and industrial applications.

Inside Dynalektric

The organisation behind every engineered solution.

Dynalektric combines engineering teams, manufacturing capability, testing processes and application experience within one operating environment.

  • In-house engineering

    Design, development and application review supported by cross-functional technical teams.

  • Manufacturing capability

    Structured production across magnetics, panels, power electronics and engineered assemblies.

  • Testing and documentation

    Inspection, validation and documentation aligned to product and project requirements.

What we engineer

Engineering systems that power, control and support industrial operations.

Dynalektric combines engineering, manufacturing and testing across four core capability areas serving demanding industrial applications.

01 / 04Capability

Power Transformation and Magnetics

01 / 04
Power Transformation and Magnetics

Transformers, reactors and magnetic components engineered for power conversion, distribution, harmonic control and specialised industrial applications.

Application-specific engineeringManufacturing and testingIndustrial and infrastructure use

Industries & applications

Engineering and NPD

Custom requirements engineered in-house.

Our engineering and new product development teams take a customer specification through feasibility, design, prototyping, validation and pilot production. One team, one process.

Standards and testing

Type-tested designs, full documentation, traceable processes.

Every product ships with routine and type test reports, QAP documentation and material traceability. Designs validated against IEC, IS and customer specifications.

Case studies

Engineering outcomes from real applications.

Selected examples of how Dynalektric applies engineering, manufacturing and testing capability across industrial applications.

Representative application image
Industrial Machinery01 / 03

55 kVA Three-Phase Auto Transformer for CNC Woodworking Machinery

Challenge

A leading machinery manufacturer required a custom three-phase auto transformer to support multiple international input voltages and deliver a stable 400 V output for CNC woodworking equipment. The solution had to maintain high electrical efficiency under continuous industrial duty and integrate seamlessly into the customer's machine architecture while meeting international standards.

Dynalektric response

Dynalektric engineered and manufactured a 55 kVA three-phase copper-wound auto transformer specifically for this application. The design incorporated optimized magnetic construction, Class F insulation, and tropicalized winding treatment. Every unit underwent comprehensive factory electrical testing and inspection before delivery, ensuring stable voltage conversion and reliable operation in demanding industrial manufacturing environments.

Custom Transformer EngineeringCopper Winding TechnologyIndustrial ManufacturingFactory Tested

Customer names and project details are shown only where approved.
